name: Silken (Tofu) Chocolate Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. This is an easy chocolate pie made with tofu, resulting in a mousse-like texture.
2. Beat the tofu at high speed in a mixer for about 5 minutes until smooth.
3. Melt the chocolate chips and beat them into the tofu mixture.
4. Beat in the maple syrup.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
6. Chill for at least 2 hours; overnight chilling is even better.
